title: hags n' cigs
description: mostly vanilla+ modpack for the hags' n cigs community server
body:
This is a 2SLGBTQ+ friendly community modpack for my group of friends and I. 

Its comprised mainly of performance mods, small QOL tweaks, as well as some mods that flesh out existing parts of the game (adding to biomes, extending some game/progression loops).

The two real "content" mods are create (including create: estrogen ofc) and spectrum.

If you've found this pack randomly, note the server is whitelisted. But you're welcome to try it out anyways.
